hooks.command: jq -e '.stop_hook_active == true' >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0 || echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "If you shipped anything this session (bug fix OR feature), run the full Ship sequence from the repo CLAUDE.md before wrapping. Do NOT treat PR-open as the end. (1) State the PR number. (2) Surface every migration or manual SQL this session created as a copy-paste fenced sql block, in full, ready for the Supabase SQL editor; if there is none, say No migration this session. (3) Wait for Jay to confirm the migration is applied. (4) Prompt Jay to merge the PR and wait for him to confirm the merge. (5) Append an entry to bugs/SHIP-LOG.md (type, pr, branch, ids, migration, status, tsc): status merged with the real PR number once Jay confirms the merge, or status pending only if he deferred it; set the migration field; state which BUG-IDs or feature scope shipped. Do not wrap before the migration is surfaced and the merge is prompted. If nothing shipped this session, say so explicitly and skip the SHIP-LOG entry."}'
